hero.title: Play your classics on Vision Pro and iPad
hero.subtitle: Spatial on Vision Pro. Portable on iPad. Browse your own game library from FolioSpace and launch into a focused emulator interface.

librarySource.label: Library source: FolioSpace
librarySource.body: FolioSpace keeps the personal game library organized; SpatialEMU focuses on gameplay, controls, and launching the right title on the right screen.

gallery.title: A game library built for real collections
gallery.body: Browse covers, filter by platform, return to recently played titles, and keep a large personal game collection usable across Vision Pro and iPad.

spatial.title: Spatial gameplay when you want the big screen
spatial.body: Use Vision Pro for a focused play space with a floating screen, controller-ready controls, and a library drawer that stays out of the way.

ipad.title: Portable play and library browsing on iPad
ipad.body: Keep browsing, filtering, and launching games on iPad with the same personal library source.

systems.title: Supported systems
systems.body: Start with classic console and arcade libraries, then keep the platform list visible and understandable for players.

files.title: Bring your own game files
files.body: SpatialEMU does not bundle games. Connect your own library through FolioSpace and play what you already own.
